section_name: Declaration of Taking by Certain Counties
chapter_title: Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
text:
(a) This section applies only to a county with a population of 3.3 million or more.

(b) If, in connection with a project under this chapter, the commissioners court of the county authorizes the county to proceed in the manner provided by Section 203.066 (Declaration of Taking for Toll Project) :

(1) the county may file a declaration of taking and proceed in the manner provided by that section on the project; and

(2) a reference to the department in that section means the county.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 284. Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
##### § 284.0615 — Declaration of Taking by Certain Counties

(a) This section applies only to a county with a population of 3.3 million or more.

(b) If, in connection with a project under this chapter, the commissioners court of the county authorizes the county to proceed in the manner provided by Section 203.066 (Declaration of Taking for Toll Project) :

    (1) the county may file a declaration of taking and proceed in the manner provided by that section on the project; and

    (2) a reference to the department in that section means the county.

*Added by Acts 2005, 79th Leg., Ch. 281 (H.B.2702), Sec. 2.53, eff. June 14, 2005.*

the county may file a declaration of taking and proceed in the manner provided by that section on the project; and
a reference to the department in that section means the county.
